codeSystems.name: AdverseEventActuality
codeSystems.title: Adverse Event Actuality
codeSystems.description: Overall nature of the adverse event, e.g. real or potential.

codeSystems.name: AllergyIntoleranceCategory
codeSystems.title: Allergy Intolerance Category
codeSystems.description: Category of an identified substance associated with allergies or intolerances.

codeSystems.name: AllergyIntoleranceCriticality
codeSystems.title: Allergy Intolerance Criticality
codeSystems.description: Estimate of the potential clinical harm, or seriousness, of a reaction to an identified substance.

codeSystems.name: AllergyIntoleranceType
codeSystems.title: Allergy Intolerance Type
codeSystems.description: Identification of the underlying physiological mechanism for a Reaction Risk.

codeSystems.name: EventStatus
codeSystems.title: EventStatus
codeSystems.description: Codes identifying the lifecycle stage of an event.

codeSystems.name: AllergyIntoleranceSeverity
codeSystems.title: Allergy Intolerance Severity
codeSystems.description: Clinical assessment of the severity of a reaction event as a whole, potentially considering multiple different manifestations.

codeSystems.name: AdverseEventCategory
codeSystems.title: AdverseEventCategory
codeSystems.description: Overall categorization of the event, e.g. product-related or situational.

codeSystems.name: AdverseEventCausalityAssessment
codeSystems.title: AdverseEventCausalityAssessment
codeSystems.description: Codes for the assessment of whether the entity caused the event.

codeSystems.name: AdverseEventSeriousness
codeSystems.title: AdverseEventSeriousness
codeSystems.description: Overall seriousness of this event for the patient.

codeSystems.name: AllergyIntoleranceClinicalStatusCodes
codeSystems.title: AllergyIntolerance Clinical Status Codes
codeSystems.description: Preferred value set for AllergyIntolerance Clinical Status.

codeSystems.name: AllergyIntoleranceVerificationStatus
codeSystems.title: AllergyIntolerance Verification Status
codeSystems.description: The verification status to support or decline the clinical status of the allergy or intolerance.

codeSystems.name: SecurityRoleType
codeSystems.title: Security Role Type
codeSystems.description: This CodeSystem contains Additional FHIR-defined Security Role types not defined elsewhere

codeSystems.name: ParticipationType
codeSystems.title: ParticipationType
codeSystems.description: A code specifying the meaning and purpose of every Participation instance. Each of its values implies specific constraints on the Roles undertaking the participation.

codeSystems.name: Ietf3066
codeSystems.title: Tags for the Identification of Languages
codeSystems.description: Older value from OID registry.  Superceded; see recommendations in BCP-47.
